html:
The Football Helmet is a wearable Armor, crafted in the Fight tab. It requires 1 Pig Skin and 1 Rope to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

It has a Durability of 450 and absorbs 80% of all physical damage. Not factoring the armor's durability, the Football Helmet effectively increases a player's hp to 750 for the average 150 hp survivor.

The Football Helmet can be given to a Pig or Bunnyman to wear to increase their HP by 450.

The Football Helmet may also be found in an Ornate Chest, which spawns in the Ruins.

Contents

  • 1 Skins
  • 2 Trivia
  • 3 Assets
  • 4 Gallery

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Barbed Helmet and Nox Helmet skins were introduced during the official The Forge event in 2017 and 2018, respectively.
  • The Woven - Elegant Warhound Helm skin was introduced during the official Year of the Varg event in 2018.

Trivia

  • The Football Helmet was added in The Birds and the Bees & Dogs That Want to Kill You update.
  • In American football, the football was once made out of animal leather and called a "pigskin".

"footballhat"
“I don't like sports.”
–Wilson
“Sports are hard.”
–Willow
“It protects my head!”
–Wolfgang
“A dead thing for me to wear. Goody.”
–Wendy
“PADDING FOR MY PROCESSING UNIT”
–WX-78
“Protective gear for full-contact endeavors.”
–Wickerbottom
“Will this give me hockey hair?”
–Woodie
“Ready for the scrimmage.”
–Maxwell
“A pig's böttöm made my helmet.”
–Wigfrid
“We could be good at football, much better than I was!”
–Webber
“Made from pork, to protect my melon.”
–Warly
“Twirly Tail hat.”
–Wormwood
“Gotta protect the assets.”
–Winona
“I hope I don't get helmet horns.”
–Wortox
“Made from hide of enemies, florp.”
–Wurt
“Oh, football! Yeah I'm uh... great at football...”
–Walter
“I don't want my brain scrambled, I'm forgetful enough as it is.”
–Wanda
The Football Helmet is a wearable Armor, crafted in the Fight tab. It requires 1 Pig Skin and 1 Rope to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
It has a Durability of 450 and absorbs 80% of all physical damage. Not factoring the armor's durability, the Football Helmet effectively increases a player's hp to 750 for the average 150 hp survivor.
The Football Helmet can be given to a Pig or Bunnyman to wear to increase their HP by 450.
The Football Helmet may also be found in an Ornate Chest, which spawns in the Ruins.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mũ bảo hiểm bóng đá là một loại Áo giáp có thể đeo được, được chế tạo trong tab Chiến đấu. Nó cần 1 Da Lợn và 1 Dây Thừng để chế tạo và Máy Luyện Kim để nguyên mẫu.

It requires 1 [[Pig Skin]] and 1 [[Rope]] to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. It has a [[Durability]] of 450 and absorbs 80% of all physical damage. Not factoring the armor's durability, the Football Helmet effectively increases a player's hp to 750 for the average 150 hp survivor. The Football Helmet can be given to a [[Pig]] or [[Bunnyman]] to wear to increase their HP by 450. The Football Helmet may also be found in an [[Ornate Chest]], which spawns in the [[Ruins]]. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head_items|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Barbed Helmet''' and '''Nox Helmet''' skins were introduced during the official [[The Forge]] event in 2017 and 2018, respectively. * The '''Woven - Elegant Warhound Helm''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Varg]] event in 2018.
